title: Global Gizmos 35570 Heart Shaped Waffle Maker / 1000W / Unique Thermostatic Design/Non-Stick Plates/Easy Clean / 25cm x 22cm / Pink Colour
features: HEART WAFFLE MAKER – Make the perfect healthy mini heart-shaped waffles in this compact and dynamic waffle maker machine. Cook up to 5 waffles at a time.
EASY CLEAN, NON-STICK COATED PLATES – The non-stick cooking plates allow for a simple transition from waffle maker to the plate, and ensures cleaning excess mess is kept to a minimum.
THERMOSTATICALLY CONTROLLED – Smart technology allows for the perfect bake every time, and the cool to touch handles ensure the mini waffle maker doesn’t get too hot to handle.
ANTI SKID RUBBER FEET – The rubber feet on this mini waffle maker keep it secure when in use, and once cooking has ceased the 25cm L x 22cm W compact design allows for easy storage.
GLOBAL GIZMOS – Browse the whole range on the store page to find doughnut makers, brownie makers, chocolate fountains and many more.
description: From the manufacturer Waffle Recipe Place all dry ingredients in a bowl and mix beat the milk and eggs together separately. Add the egg and milk mixture into the dry ingredients and then add the oil. Mix well until all lumps have disappeared Place batter into waffle maker and close lid, Cook for 5-6 minutes or until golden brown. Put your favourite toppings on and eat! 250g Plain Flour 7g Baking Powder 20g Caster Sugar 5g Salt 475ml Milk 2 Eggs 30ml Vegetable Oil So Quick and Easy to Make! Baking rather than frying makes them healthier too! Cool touch handle, skid proof feet and indicator light make the waffle maker secure and safe to use. Easy clean non-stick plates mean you spend less time cleaning your waffle maker and more time enjoying delicious baked waffles! The waffle maker even stands upright for easy storage.
